prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约15912→15251→11415→18334→15883，整体波动较大；2023年因选科要求调整（化学组与不限组分设）出现异常前移至11415，2024年 因不限组拉低至18334，2025年回升至15883；近两年基准约15883名；本省物理类计划2021年139人→2022年136人→2023年136人→2024年133人→2025年121人→2026 年114人，呈持续缩减趋势；2026年较2025年减少7人（-5.8%），缩招使竞争加剧，位次数字有减小压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约 第80名，近年排名稳定在79–83区间，属中上水平理工类院校；2026年声誉偏负面，涉及学术不端通报事件；2025年声誉亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖 音热度一般（总排名第77），短视频曝光量偏低；2025年投档异常信号为低关注，但热门专业投档线暴跌可能对次年报考心理产生滞后影响；管理科学与工程为 A级学科，是该校唯一A-及以上学科；工科整体实力较强，车辆工程、机械、电气等传统优势专业在行业内有较高认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电 气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校工科定位契合；福建省物理类考生2021年11.7万→2025年19.2万持续增长，2026年估算约20.4万（+6.1%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；合肥工业大学位于安徽省，非本省高校，无本地倾斜；福建省考生对省外211高校报考意愿平稳，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划持续缩招（-5.8%）、福建省物理类考生增长约6.1%以及声誉偏负面等因素，竞争压力有所加大，位次有前移动力；但2025年基准15883已处 于近年中位，缩招与考生增长形成双向挤压，预计2026年最低位次小幅前移至约15500名，区间15200–15800名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 15912 → 15251 → 11415 → 18334 → 15883. In 2023, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (separate chemistry group and unrestricted group), there was an abnormal shift to 11415. In 2024, the unrestricted group lowered it to 18334, and in 2025, it rebounded to 15883. The recent two-year baseline is approximately 15883. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan has been continuously decreasing: 139 in 2021 → 136 in 2022 → 136 in 2023 → 133 in 2024 → 121 in 2025 → 114 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 7 students (-5.8%). The enrollment reduction intensifies competition, putting downward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 80th, with recent rankings stable in the 79–83 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. In 2026, its reputation is somewhat negative, involving an academic misconduct notification incident. In 2025, its reputation was also somewhat negative (the admission cutoff scores for popular majors plummeted). Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 77th), with low short video exposure. The 2025 admission anomaly signal indicates low attention, but the sharp drop in popular major cutoff scores may have a lagging effect on the following year's application psychology. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, the only A- or above discipline at this university. The overall strength of engineering is strong, with traditional advantageous majors such as Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering having high recognition in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's engineering orientation. The number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has been increasing: 117,000 in 2021 → 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026 (+6.1%). The expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition. Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province, not a local university in Fujian, so there is no local preference. Fujian examinees' willingness to apply to 211 universities outside the province is stable, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the continuous enrollment reduction in 2026 (-5.8%), the approximately 6.1% increase in Fujian Physics Category examinees, and the somewhat negative reputation, competitive pressure has increased, with a tendency for rankings to move forward. However, the 2025 baseline of 15883 is already at the median of recent years. The enrollment reduction and examinee growth create a two-way squeeze. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will slightly move forward to approximately 15500, with a range of 15200–15800.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 15500, range 15200–15800. Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Integrated Circuits, Electrical Engineering, etc.) have historical rankings around 5800–8200, far exceeding the predicted range, so they are recommended as reach goals. Tier 2 majors (Automation, Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc.) have rankings around 7400–10000, also above the predicted range, and can be attempted as reach goals. Tier 3 majors (Financial Engineering, Accounting, Industrial Engineering, Architecture) have rankings around 12000–15900, which are more aligned with the predicted range, and are recommended as the main application direction. Overall strategy: focus on Tier 3, reach for Tier 2, and boldly attempt Tier 1.
